name: wacli
description: Send WhatsApp messages to other people or search/sync WhatsApp history via the wacli CLI (not for normal user chats).
intent_triggers: 我需要處理 wacli 相關工作
幫我啟用 wacli 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 wacli

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the wacli skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
